events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create Word documents from Copilot Notebooks
events.titleJa: Copilot ノートブック から Word 文書生成に対応
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create Word documents from Copilot Notebooks
events.summary: Copilot Notebooks allows users to generate Word documents using the content and references gathered in a notebook. Copilot drafts a structured document grounded in the notebook’s context, which can be opened and edited in Word, helping users move from ideas and source material to a ready‑to‑use document with fewer man...
events.summaryJa: Copilot ノートブックに収集したコンテンツや参照情報を使って Word 文書を生成できます。Copilot がノートブックのコンテキストに基づいた構造化ドキュメントを下書きし、Word で開いて編集できます。アイデアや素材から完成度の高い文書を効率的に作成できます。
events.summaryEn: Copilot Notebooks allows users to generate Word documents using the content and references gathered in a notebook. Copilot drafts a structured document grounded in the notebook’s context, which can be opened and edited in Word, helping users move from ideas and source material to a ready‑to‑use document with fewer man...
events.importanceReason: 提供開始済みで利用可否の確認に直結するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Teams: Facilitator detects and answers questions
events.titleJa: Microsoft Teams の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Teams: Facilitator detects and answers questions
events.summary: Facilitator now automatically detects open questions raised during a Teams meeting and offers to help answer them using web search. When a participant asks a question (e.g., “What is an LLM?”) and no one answers, Facilitator posts a prompt offering to find an answer. Participants can select “Yes” to have the agent ret...
events.summaryJa: Teams 会議中に参加者から出た未回答の質問を Facilitator が自動検出し、Web 検索で回答を提案するようになりました。参加者が質問しても誰も答えない場合、Facilitator が回答を検索するか確認します。「はい」を選択するとエージェントが回答を返します。
events.summaryEn: Facilitator now automatically detects open questions raised during a Teams meeting and offers to help answer them using web search. When a participant asks a question (e.g., “What is an LLM?”) and no one answers, Facilitator posts a prompt offering to find an answer. Participants can select “Yes” to have the agent ret...
events.importanceReason: 今後の展開計画や事前準備に影響するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention to restrict processing external emails in Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat
events.titleJa: Microsoft Purview の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention to restrict processing external emails in Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat
events.summary: We are expanding Microsoft Purview DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat to safeguard risks from external emails. This real-time control helps organizations mitigate data risks by preventing Microsoft 365 Copilot and Chat from processing emails from senders external to your organization. This capability curre...
events.summaryJa: Microsoft Purview の DLP を Microsoft 365 Copilot と Copilot Chat に拡張し、外部メールに起因するリスクに対処します。組織外の送信者からのメールを Copilot が処理しないようリアルタイムで制御し、データ漏えいのリスクを低減します。
events.summaryEn: We are expanding Microsoft Purview DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat to safeguard risks from external emails. This real-time control helps organizations mitigate data risks by preventing Microsoft 365 Copilot and Chat from processing emails from senders external to your organization. This capability curre...
events.importanceReason: 今後の展開計画や事前準備に影響するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Security Triage Agent in Data Loss Prevention - Reasoning Trace and Confidence Score for agent-triaged alerts
events.titleJa: Microsoft Purview のセキュリティ・管理・分析機能を強化
events.titleEn: Microsoft Purview: Data Security Triage Agent in Data Loss Prevention - Reasoning Trace and Confidence Score for agent-triaged alerts
events.summary: This feature introduces confidence scoring and reasoning trace explainability into the Data Security Triage Agent in DLP, addressing a critical trust gap reported across multiple customers. Today, without transparency into why the agent makes a decision or how confident it is, analysts are forced to fall back to manua...
events.summaryJa: DLP の Data Security Triage Agent に信頼スコアと推論トレースの可視化機能を導入します。エージェントの判断根拠や確信度が不透明なため手動対応を強いられていた課題に対応し、アナリストがエージェントの判断を信頼して活用できる環境を整えます。
events.summaryEn: This feature introduces confidence scoring and reasoning trace explainability into the Data Security Triage Agent in DLP, addressing a critical trust gap reported across multiple customers. Today, without transparency into why the agent makes a decision or how confident it is, analysts are forced to fall back to manua...
events.importanceReason: 今後の展開計画や事前準備に影響するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため
